Skills

Skills are instruction packs that teach your agent how and when to use tools.

Active
🐙
GitHub
GitHub CLI for issues, PRs, CI/check logs, comments, reviews, releases, repos, and gh api queries.
Instruction-only
Platform
Active
💬
Slack
Slack tool actions: send/read/edit/delete messages, react, pin/unpin, list pins/reactions/emoji, member info.
Instruction-only
Platform
Active
☔
Weather
Current weather and forecasts with wttr.in via curl for locations, rain, temperature, travel planning.
Instruction-only
Lookups
Active
🧭
Diagram Maker
Create SVG/HTML or Excalidraw diagrams for concepts, architecture, flows, and whiteboards.
Authoring
Inactive
🔧
Skill Creator
Create, edit, audit, tidy, validate, or restructure AgentSkills and SKILL.md files.
Authoring
Active
🔍
Healthcheck
Audit/harden OpenClaw hosts: SSH, firewall, updates, exposure, backups, disk encryption, gateway security.
Instruction-only
System
